hades_integration_notes.recommended_model: Per-user HERMES_HOME/profile as the primary isolation boundary; Hades verifies routing, auth, approvals, and artifact publication.
hades_integration_notes.do_not_manually_model_every_tool: Grant capability envelopes and intercept boundary-crossing actions instead of writing one Hades adapter for every Hermes skill.
hades_integration_notes.routing: Use Hades-issued taskId plus signed/encrypted routing token; do not trust Hermes-authored userId as authority.
hades_integration_notes.telegram_gif_implication: Hermes can use messaging gateways, but Hades-owned Telegram delivery still needs either a direct scoped Hermes gateway or a structured/proposed action that Hades executes with the correct user connection.
